heading: Cooperative information exchange system
label: 262m–3 Cooperative information exchange system
text: The Secretary of the Treasury, in consultation with the Secretary of State and the Administrator of the Agency for International Development, shall create a system for cooperative exchange of information with other interested member countries on assistance proposals of the multilateral development banks.
notes: Codificationis based on section 701 of title VII of H.R. 3750, One Hundredth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Section 1304 of Pub. L. 95–118Pub. L. 100–202Dec. 11, 1987
